channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st March
item.description:
See it even affects the vulnerable

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Curb stone needs replacing., 31st March
item.description:
Curb stone on Hassop Walk at the junction of Horley Road outside the flats needs replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hassop Walk, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp or working, 31st March
item.description:
The street lamp does not work
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acorn Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on public footpath between Bury St N9 opposite Walmer house and the A10 Great Cambridge Rd, 31st March
item.description:
Resident reported but nothing done as rubbish, bags, carpet & clothing still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bury Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in centre or road, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole in centre of road. This has already been filled once. Please can this pothole and any others in this road be filled. The road is a mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Maiden Erlegh Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in centre of road, 31st March
item.description:
There is a large pothole in the centre of the road where Hurst rd meets Eynsford crescent. Cars are swerving to avoid the pothole making it dangerous. This was previously filled and needs filling again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 331, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped Mattress, 31st March
item.description:
A white mattress has been dumped next to the parking area in Bursted woods. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped Burnt Ash Hill SE12 0AB, 31st March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped next to electrical recycling bin in Burnt Ash Hill and Glenmere Road next to Lee railway bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard flyposted with stickers, 31st March
item.description:
Please remove these stickers. old kent road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of flytipping on old kent road, 31st March
item.description:
Please take this away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 725, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black utility unit graffitied on old kent road, 31st March
item.description:
Please cover the white graffiti tag on the top

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cushions flytipped on pathway, 31st March
item.description:
Please take away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall - old kent road, 31st March
item.description:
Please remove graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillbeck Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canal path broken, 31st March
item.description:
The canal path is breaking up and falling into the canal, it has got worse over the past 3 weeks. This path is heavily used by active travellers who risk falling into the canal on bike or foot and risk downing from cold water shock. Please can it be fixed while keeping the rest of the path open for active travel, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arlington Avenue, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp was recently fixed, just beyond Harris academy, 31st March
item.description:
The light now switches on and off, on fir 5 minutes, then off again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alley with urine and food, 31st March
item.description:
This alley stinks of urine. It also frequently has food waste and dirtied food containers. Today the alley also has cardboard boxes and other rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged railing, 31st March
item.description:
Railing is at pedestrian crossing. End of railing has been bent out of place so it is no longer connected to the main body of the railing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Alice St & Decima St, 31st March
item.description:
Reported dumped black metal framed furniture, received an email to say that the issue was resolved, but it hasn’t been removed and is still in the same place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Decima Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage appears to look like fire/arson, 31st March
item.description:
Playground equipment vandalised. Playground currently closed. Vandalised equipment is boxed off but unable to use swings. Unfair that whole playground inaccessible for children. Lack of response to clear damaged equipment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riverside Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement 7-9 Shrubland Road, 31st March
item.description:
Sofa and gaming chair dumped on pavement on grounds outside block 1-9 Shrubland Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
